name: Jalapeno Squash Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 10 oz can cream of mushroom soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover and cook squash and onions in a small amount of boiling water in a large saucepan until tender (5 minutes); drain well.
2. Stir together the cooked squash and onion mixture, cheese spread, and next 4 ingredients until blended.
3. Spoon the mixture into a lightly greased 13x9 inch baking dish.
4. Combine breadcrumbs and butter; sprinkle over squash.
5. Bake at 300 degrees F for 55 minutes or until golden brown.
